category_sources: source_facts.description says Clozure CL is a Common Lisp implementation; official Clozure site describes CCL documentation and manuals.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses Clozure CL; official Clozure homepage and documentation use Clozure CL.
docs_sources: Official Clozure documentation page provides user and internals manuals; official GitHub README is repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports Common Lisp implementation tags; source_facts.executables identifies the CCL runtime command.
